blockers.message: Profitability, strategy, optimizer, and convergence evidence maturity is not sufficient for live review or scale-up.

The Upbit PAPER candidate scorecard is now dashboard-visible, but OOS, walk-forward, bootstrap, concentration, and repeated-window evidence are still missing; it remains PAPER review only and cannot create live readiness.

notes: Rechecked in MVP-4. Paper/shadow evidence now separates PAPER scorecard input eligibility from long-run evidence maturity. The dashboard projects candidate_scorecard.json as display-only PAPER evidence and shows the net EV after cost and primary robustness blocker. OOS, walk-forward, bootstrap, concentration, and repeated-window evidence remain required before promotion review; this gap cannot be closed by display visibility.
